deep_learning.question: What is Deep Learning, and how does it differ from traditional Machine Learning?
What is an artificial neural network?
What are the input, hidden, and output layers in a neural network?
What is an activation function, and why is it important?
What is the purpose of a loss function?
What is gradient descent?
What is an epoch in deep learning?
What is a batch, and what is a batch size?
What is overfitting in deep learning?
Name some common deep learning frameworks.
Explain how forward propagation works in a neural network.
Explain how backpropagation updates neural network weights.
Compare ReLU, Sigmoid, and Tanh activation functions.
Explain the purpose of dropout in neural networks.
What is batch normalization, and why is it useful?
Compare SGD, Adam, and RMSProp optimizers.
What is transfer learning, and when would you use it?
How would you detect that a neural network is overfitting?
Why are GPUs commonly used for deep learning?
Explain the difference between CNNs, RNNs, and Transformers.
Explain the vanishing and exploding gradient problems and describe techniques used to address them.
How would you diagnose why a neural network is not converging during training?
How would you optimize the training time of a large deep learning model?
Explain the trade-offs between model depth, width, and computational cost.
Describe strategies for improving the generalization ability of a deep learning model.
How would you select an appropriate neural network architecture for a new AI problem?
Explain the trade-offs between training a model from scratch and using transfer learning.
How would you reduce GPU memory consumption while training a large neural network?
Describe the complete lifecycle of developing and deploying a deep learning model.
How would you evaluate whether increasing model size is a better solution than improving the quality of the training data?
A deep learning model that performed well during development suddenly performs poorly in production. Walk me through your investigation.
Training a neural network takes several days and frequently runs out of GPU memory. Explain how you would optimize the training process.
A teammate reports that the training loss continues to decrease while the validation loss steadily increases. How would you respond?
You inherit a deep learning model with millions of parameters but almost no documentation. Explain how you would begin understanding and improving it.
Your customer requires an AI model to run on a mobile device with limited memory and processing power. Describe the trade-offs and optimizations you would consider.
A model's predictions become unstable after introducing new training data. Walk me through your debugging process.
A stakeholder requests a model that is both significantly more accurate and twice as fast. How would you evaluate whether both goals are realistic?
You are responsible for training a deep learning model on sensitive healthcare data. Explain how you would protect privacy while maintaining model performance.
A production GPU cluster becomes unavailable shortly before an important model release. Describe how you would adapt your training and deployment strategy.
Your team must build an AI system capable of processing millions of images every day. Explain how you would design the deep learning pipeline, infrastructure, monitoring, and deployment strategy.
